creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to szubersk from comment #37)

base isn't really the issue;  just kernel.  The reason I was asking about main vs. stable/13 was that at that time there was a difference in code now yet MFCed which happened this morning.  I am just wondering if 4b63d8489ecf29e1acc50f1466b22f529db61eee could be your issue but it was hard to say.  If the panic doesn't go away you could try backing that single change out and see if that helps.  I am just saying as I'll drop off later today for a day or two so you can go ahead and see.  I am still hoping that it's something else :-)
